hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '/public/case/.*\.png$'; then base=$(basename "$f"); newbase="${base%.png}.webp"; npx --yes sharp-cli -i "$f" -o "${f%.png}.webp" --format webp --quality 80 && find /Users/marinaadresta/Desktop/claude-portfolio -name '*.vue' -exec sed -i '' "s|${base}|${newbase}|g" {} +; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
